name: timovi
description: Assemble a digital product team in your AI coding agent — Product Manager, UX Designer, Software Architect, Tech Lead, Engineers, QA, and more. One command, your entire product pipeline.
author: Guilherme Zaia

scripts.dashboard: cd dashboard/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd .. && node backend/server.js & cd frontend && npx vite --open
scripts.dashboard:setup: cd dashboard/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dashboard:dev: cd dashboard && node backend/server.js & cd frontend && npx vite --open
